entry.title: Your Life Events
entry.subtitle: Add dates of key events. The more specific, the better.
entry.min_events_hint: Add at least one event with a date and category to continue.

honesty.near_tie: The events you provided do not clearly favour one candidate time over the other. Both are plausible. Only a recorded birth certificate can settle a near-tie — this result is a hypothesis, not a verdict.
honesty.leans: The evidence leans toward one candidate, but the margin is modest. Treat this as a working hypothesis to weigh against your lived experience — not a definitive finding.
honesty.consistent: The events consistently support the leading candidate. Even so, no algorithm replaces a recorded birth certificate. Use this time as a starting point, not a certainty.

signals.dasha_lord_in: Dasha lord is placed in the {{houseOrdinal}} house

results.title: Rectification Results
results.representative_caveat: This is a representative time for this window — not a claim to the exact minute.
results.near_tie_settle_note: Only a recorded birth certificate can settle a near-tie. Both candidates below are plausible — weigh them against your lived experience.
results.window_caveat: Events narrow the rising sign only, not the exact minute. The representative time shown is illustrative — it places you within the sign, not at a precise birth moment.

intro.heading: Narrow your rising sign
intro.body: If your birth time is uncertain, life events can help narrow the window. The engine will test whether your recorded time — or a nearby candidate — better fits the pattern of events you enter.
intro.honesty: This is a hypothesis engine, not a verdict machine. A recorded birth certificate always wins. What you get is a ranked shortlist and an honest confidence label.

fit.heading: Analysing your events…
fit.body: The on-device engine is comparing candidate birth windows against your life events. This usually takes a few seconds.
fit.engine_warming: The chart engine is still warming up. The analysis will start automatically once it is ready.
fit.device_note: Fitting your events against candidate charts. This runs entirely on your device.

accelerator.title: Paste Your Story
accelerator.warning: What you type here — including any names or places — is sent to your configured AI endpoint. Only the extracted dates and event types stay on your device.
accelerator.textarea_placeholder: Describe key life events in plain text — dates and what happened…
accelerator.gated_note: Configure an AI cloud endpoint in Settings to use this feature.
accelerator.empty_result: Couldn't extract any events — add them manually using the button below.
accelerator.error: Something went wrong — the AI call failed. Check your connection or endpoint settings and try again.
